title: MC Bahnschrift
description: A clean, legible, and no fuss font variation of the famous DIN 1451 font. "Bahnschrift", which was created and released by Microsoft for Windows 10, is now used in a variety of places, such as the XBOX main UI amongst others.
body:
A clean, legible, and no fuss font variation of the famous DIN 1451 font. "Bahnschrift", which was created and released by Microsoft for Windows 10, is now used in a variety of places, such as the XBOX main UI amongst others. I am using this font all over my system, programs such as Discord/Firefox, etc. However:

I had been longing for the ability to change my font in Minecraft to a more legible one, of which Bahnschrift is the cleanest one by far (fight me about it). Minecraft never ended up with such a functionality however, and only mods ever implemented such a feature. The mod which implemented said feature unfortunately never was really updated for Fabric or higher versions of Minecraft, so the functionality eventually wasn't there anymore either. However, Minecraft ended up allowing the swapping of fonts via Resource Packs, and I was hoping for someone to make one for the cleanest and best font in the world (once again, fight me about it). This never ended up happening, so thanks for nothing. Kidding, I did it myself instead, and here is the result.

The Bahnschrift font was created by Microsoft, which is an adaptation of the original German DIN 1451 font, used all across Germany for highway signs, other signage, and also for signage in the railroad system, hence the name "Bahnschrift", because "Bahn" means "Train/Railroad" and "Schrift" stands for "Scripture/Font" in German.

Check out the screenshots for a direct comparison.


**Disclaimer**:
Bahnschrift was created by Microsoft. For more info, check out [Microsoft's own page on Bahnschrift](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/typography/font-list/bahnschrift). I am not affiliated with Microsoft, and neither is this mod.
